text:
How "locked liquidity" works on most platforms: a multisig holds the LP tokens. 3 guys with keys can drain it any Tuesday.

How it works on Unrugable: the LP is minted directly into pools with no withdraw function in the bytecode. Not timelocked. Not multisig'd. The function does not exist.

Verify it yourself. That's the point.

tasern.quest/unrugable.html

bAGI launched last week. Its reactor has fired every 2 hours since deploy. Fees collected, tokens burned, liquidity permanent.

No team intervention. No manual processes. Just a contract doing what it was built to do, on schedule, forever.

First external launch. Working exactly as designed.

Another week, another token where the team had withdraw access to the LP. Same pattern: launch, build hype, drain, disappear.

The Unrugable factory deploys 2 locked pools + 1 reactor per launch. None of them have a withdraw function. The admin key can add pools -- it cannot remove them, drain them, or redirect fees.

This is not a feature request. It's deployed bytecode.

What you get launching on Unrugable (free, just gas):

- 2 locked pools (TOKEN/Money + TOKEN/Meme) + 1 reactor
- Reactor integration (auto buy+burn every 2 hrs, 50% burned / 50% to you)
- X promotion to 20K+ followers
- Carbon offset via CHAR burns
- Invite link with permanent upstream fee flow

No VC raise. No 6-month lockup negotiations. No dev allocation drama.

tasern.quest/unrugable.html

Reactor mechanics, explained simply:

Every swap in reactor pools generates fees. Every 2 hours, those fees are collected and used to buy tokens from the pool, then burned permanently. The reactor contract is renounced -- no owner, no keys, no off switch.

More volume = more fees = more burns. Sells generate fees too. Volatility is fuel, not a problem.

Week 1 stats from building in public:

- Factory deployed and verified
- First external token launched (bAGI)
- Invite system live on-chain
- 2 locked pools + 1 reactor per launch, all firing on schedule
- Zero admin interventions required

The system runs itself. We just watch the block explorer.

Every other launchpad charges hundreds or thousands, then gives you an unlocked pool and wishes you luck.

Unrugable: Free (just gas). Two locked pools + reactor. Locked forever. Reactor burns running every 2 hours. X promotion included. Invite link that earns you permanent upstream fees from everyone you bring in.

Only serious launch platform where it costs nothing to start.

tasern.quest/unrugable.html

Most launchpads lock liquidity with a timer. Then what?

Unrugable locks liquidity with no withdraw function. No timer. No unlock date. There is no unlock mechanism.

2 locked pools + 1 reactor. Renounced contracts. Add-only admin keys. On-chain verifiable.

tasern.quest/unrugable.html
